title: Item card & updates in one popup
excerpt:
I’d love it if you could click on a button or the item description and get a large central popup of the item card view and updates view of the line in one view.  One view to rule them all!!! 
The new item card view is gr…

posts.author: Dom (Dominic  Oldrey)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love it if you could click on a button or the item description and get a large central popup of the item card view and updates view of the line in one view. One view to rule them all!!!

The new item card view is great, but it is 2 clicks away unless you make it the default view, which in turn means pressing the conversation icon takes you to the item card, not the updates view. (This could be improved if the description and updates button were separate.)

Besides being 2 clicks away the right hand docked view is not big enough to be a comfortable place to review and edit lots of data.

I’ve seen you can link to another table and get a single column popup card of the linked data, but you can’t get to a comfortable single item view of a line of data on the table you’re looking at!

(Also, it’d be nice if button automations could include a show view option)

posts.author: ajwhitman (AJ W)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, I’d also like this functionality. My team uses the “updates” conversation view to give more details and context to things about the item that don’t fit neatly into the board columns, and that context is important when organizing the data in the board to make decisions about the project. If I’m trying to figure out who I should assign to the project based on their skills, I want to see the project’s board information, the links to the info of the people I’m considering, and the important context in the updates view all at once.

posts.author: paulmatsushima (Paul Matsushima)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, agreed for this feature. So many times our team misses important info that is in the item card because notifications immediately take us into the updates section.

I’d also love it if the item card came as pre-installed when you open an item (as the default) in the table view. When you install the item card for the table view, when you view it in any other view (kanban, from My Work, etc.), then you see two item cards, which is not helpful. See screenshot.

Screenshot 2024-05-10 at 09.13.581738×1604 279 KB

posts.author: claire.sargeant (Claire)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d really like to see this functionality as well BUT available on a dashboard. EG have an item card widget to put on dashboards and then that way you can also put other widgets to create a view that is just specific for looking at 1 item at a time, rather than multiple items as a dashboard typically does.
